---
title: "GANs as Minimax Games"
short-title: "GANs"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Generative adversarial networks through the lens of game theory: convergence, mode collapse, and Wasserstein GANs."
keywords: ["GAN", "minimax", "generative adversarial network", "convergence", "mode collapse"]
---

# GANs as Minimax Games {#sec-gans}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
